sentences.arabic: تُحِبُّ سَارَةُ تَنْظِيمَ وَقْتِهَا فِي الْمَكْتَبِ بِدِقَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Sara voli precizno organizovati svoje vrijeme u kancelariji.
sentences.translationEn: Sarah likes to organize her time in the office precisely.

sentences.arabic: تَبْدَأُ يَوْمَهَا بِكِتَابَةِ قَائِمَةِ الْمَهَامِّ الْيَوْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Svoj dan započinje pisanjem liste dnevnih zadataka.
sentences.translationEn: She starts her day by writing a daily to-do list.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا النِّظَامُ يُسَاعِدُهَا عَلَى زِيَادَةِ الْإِنْتَاجِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj sistem joj pomaže da poveća produktivnost.
sentences.translationEn: This system helps her increase productivity.
